title: xeraino #3583
definition:
1) to make dry, dry up, wither
 2) to become dry, to be dry, be withered
    2a) of plants
    2b) of the ripening of crops
    2c) of fluids
    2d) of the members of the body
 3) to waste away, pine away, i.e. a withered hand
